meta.title: Flowbook — Storybook for Flowcharts
meta.description: Auto-discover Mermaid diagrams from your codebase. Organize by category. Browse in a beautiful viewer.

hero.title: Storybook for Flowcharts
hero.subtitle: Auto-discovers Mermaid diagram files from your codebase, organizes them by category, and renders them in a browsable viewer.

features.sectionSubtitle: Everything you need to document and visualize your codebase flows.

autoDiscovery.title: Auto-Discovery
autoDiscovery.description: Automatically scans your project for .flow.md and .flowchart.md files. No manual configuration needed.

categoryOrganization.title: Category Organization
categoryOrganization.description: Organize diagrams by category with a collapsible sidebar. Tags and search for quick navigation.

liveReload.title: Live Reload
liveReload.description: Powered by Vite HMR. Edit your flow files and see changes instantly in the browser.

aiPowered.title: AI-Powered Generation
aiPowered.description: AI coding agents automatically analyze your codebase and generate flow diagrams for every significant logic path.

mermaidRendering.title: Mermaid Rendering
mermaidRendering.description: Full Mermaid 11 support. Flowcharts, sequence diagrams, class diagrams, and more.

staticBuild.title: Static Build
staticBuild.description: Build a static site and deploy anywhere. Perfect for documentation hosting.

howItWorks.sectionSubtitle: From .flow.md files to a beautiful browsable viewer in seconds.

step1.title: Write
step1.description: Create .flow.md files with YAML frontmatter and Mermaid diagrams anywhere in your project.

step2.title: Discover
step2.description: Flowbook's Vite plugin auto-discovers all flow files, parses frontmatter, and extracts Mermaid blocks.

step3.title: Browse
step3.description: View all your diagrams in an organized, searchable interface with live reload.

quickStart.step1Desc: Adds scripts and an example flow file to your project.
quickStart.step2Desc: Opens the Flowbook viewer at localhost:6200 with HMR.
quickStart.step3Desc: Generates a static site ready to deploy anywhere.

flowFile.sectionSubtitle: Simple Markdown with YAML frontmatter and Mermaid diagrams.

aiSkills.sectionSubtitle: Let AI coding agents auto-generate flow documentation for your entire codebase.
aiSkills.description: Install the Flowbook skill for your favorite coding agent. When you mention "flowbook" in your prompt, the agent will:
aiSkills.step1: Analyze your codebase for logical flows
aiSkills.step2: Set up Flowbook if not already initialized

agents.sectionSubtitle: Works with all major AI coding agents.

cta.title: Ready to visualize your codebase?
cta.subtitle: Get started with Flowbook in seconds. Open source. Free forever.
